blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.

blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for mobile signature capture
Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify mobile signature capture functionality.
Add evidence for signature capture on documents
Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify signature capture on work orders and receipts.
Add evidence for photo documentation linkage
Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the linkage of photo documentation to signatures.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of multiple aspects of the appliance installation process, including signature capture, photo documentation, and payment processing. However, the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm these functionalities are implemented. The linked use case outlines the requirements but lacks the necessary evidence to assert that they are satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of mobile signature capture functionality.
No evidence of signature capture on documents.
No evidence of photo documentation linked to signatures.
